msdistributors

Quick Overview

M5 Super Finishing Paste Compound Menzerna polishing compounds are specially formulated to help jewellers achieve that professional quality finish. Menzerna M5 White is a super fine finishing compound with a dry grease content, developed with premium polishing minerals to produce an exceptional mirror gloss finish. Safe to use and easy...

[Description](javascript:void(0))

[Review](javascript:void(0))

M5 Super Finishing Paste Compound

Menzerna polishing compounds are specially formulated to help jewellers achieve that professional quality finish. Menzerna M5 White is a super fine finishing compound with a dry grease content, developed with premium polishing minerals to produce an exceptional mirror gloss finish. Safe to use and easy to clean up, this polishing compound is suitable for use with paint, stainless steel, and precious metals.

--
M5 Super Finishing Paste Compound

Menzerna polishing compounds are specially formulated to help achieve that professional quality finish. Menzerna M5 White is a super fine finishing compound with a dry grease content, developed with premium polishing minerals to produce an exceptional mirror gloss finish. Safe to use and easy to clean up, this polishing compound is suitable for use with paint, stainless steel, and precious metals.
